2604.27724.title: Iterative Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Medical Question Answering
2604.27724.paper_summary: Medical retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems typically operate on text chunks extracted from biomedical literature, discarding the rich visual content (tables, figures, structured layouts) of original document pages. We propose MED-VRAG, an iterative multimodal RAG framework that retrieves and reasons over PMC document page images instead of OCR'd text. The system pairs ColQwen2.5 patch-level page embeddings with a sharded MapReduce LLM filter, scaling to ~350K pages while keeping Stage-1 retrieval under 30 ms via an offline coarse-to-fine index (C=8 centroids per page, ANN over centroids, exact two-way scoring on the top-R shortlist). A vision-language model (VLM) then iteratively refines its query and accumulates evidence in a memory bank across up to 3 reasoning rounds, with a single iteration costing ~15.9 s and the full three-round pipeline ~47.8 s on 4xA100. Across four medical QA benchmarks (MedQA, MedMCQA, PubMedQA, MMLU-Med), MEDVRAG reaches 78.6% average accuracy. Under controlled comparison with the same Qwen2.5-VL-32B backbone, retrieval contributes a +5.8 point gain over the no-retrieval baseline; we also note a +1.8 point edge over MedRAG + GPT-4 (76.8%), with the caveat that this is a cross-paper rather than head-to-head comparison. Ablations isolate +1.0 from page-image vs text-chunk retrieval, +1.5 from iteration, and +1.0 from the memory bank.
2604.27724.paper_summary_zh: 醫療檢索增強生成（RAG）系統通常基於從生物醫學文獻中提取的文本片段運作，忽略了原始文檔頁面中的豐富視覺內容（表格、圖形、結構化佈局）。我們提出了MED-VRAG，一種迭代的多模態RAG框架，它檢索並推理PMC文檔頁面圖像，而不是OCR文本。該系統將ColQwen2.5的補丁級頁面嵌入與分片的MapReduce LLM過濾器配對，擴展到約350K頁，同時通過離線的粗到細索引保持第一階段檢索在30毫秒以內（每頁8個質心，對質心進行ANN，對前R短列表進行精確的雙向打分）。然後，視覺-語言模型（VLM）在最多3輪推理中迭代地細化其查詢並在記憶庫中累積證據，單次迭代約需15.9秒，完整的三輪管道在4xA100上約需47.8秒。在四個醫療問答基準（MedQA、MedMCQA、PubMedQA、MMLU-Med）中，MED-VRAG達到78.6%的平均準確率。在與相同Qwen2.5-VL-32B骨幹的受控比較中，檢索相較於無檢索基準貢獻了+5.8的增益；我們還注意到相較於MedRAG + GPT-4（76.8%）有+1.8的優勢，但需要注意的是這是一個跨論文而非正面比較。消融實驗顯示，頁面圖像與文本片段檢索之間的增益為+1.0，迭代的增益為+1.5，記憶庫的增益為+1.0。
2604.27724.author: Xupeng Chen et.al.
2604.27724.authors: Xupeng Chen, Binbin Shi, Chenqian Le, Jiaqi Zhang, Kewen Wang, Ran Gong, Jinhan Zhang, Chihang Wang
